subcodes.first_line: The ancient glory and the divine exaltation of the heavenly loved ones are specifically assured and written in the heavenly scriptures as affirmed in the Qur'an [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عزت قدیمه و علویت الهیه احبای ربانیه یه مخصوص و صحائف سماایه ده منصوص در قران ده
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
